original_question: What does CELEX 31997R2316 state regarding the matter described in the excerpt?
enhanced_question: In accordance with Article 13 of Council Regulation (EC) No 3197/1997, as amended by Council Regulation (EC) No 2316/1997, what specific provisions and requirements are imposed on Member States regarding the implementation and enforcement of environmental protection measures in relation to industrial activities that emit significant amounts of greenhouse gases?

original_question: What does CELEX 32009R0295 state regarding the matter described in the excerpt?
enhanced_question: In accordance with Article 29 of Directive 2009/29/EC (CELEX number 32009R0295), what provisions and requirements are stipulated by this Regulation concerning the matters referred to in the provided excerpt?
